§6Digital Fabrication: 3D Printers§f

§aDesign and manufacture custom decorative blocks, buttons, and light sources!§f
The §b3D Printer§f allows you to fabricate custom blocks with custom collision boundaries, light emission, and redstone properties.

§6Materials & Ink§f:
Printing requires raw resources loaded into the printer's buffers:
§b• Chamelium§f: The structural filament. Each piece provides §e2,000 material units§f.
§b• Ink Cartridge§f: The colorant. Each cartridge provides §e50,000 ink units§f.
§b• Print Energy Cost§f: Fabricating a model requires §e100 energy§f.

§6Custom Print Behaviors§f:
You can design prints with interactive states (off and on):
§b• Light Emission§f: Prints default to a maximum base light level of §e8§f. You can boost this further by crafting prints with §bGlowstone Dust§f.
§b• Custom Redstone Output§f: To output a specific redstone signal (1-14) in the active state, it costs an extra §e300 material units§f.
§b• No-Clip Multiplier§f: If you make a state non-collidable (allowing entities to pass through them like air), the Chamelium cost is multiplied by §c2×§f.
§b• Recycling§f: If you print the wrong model, put it back into the printer to get a §a75% refund§f of its original material cost.

§eFun Fact: Edible Chamelium§f:
In a pinch, §bChamelium§f is edible! Eating it grants you a short §aInvisibility§f buff, but inflicts a slightly longer §cBlindness§f debuff.
